appTitleDescription: Shown in the browser tab and the console. Blank = “DeviceChain”.
contrastWarning: Sidebar foreground/background contrast is {{ratio}}:1 — below the WCAG AA target of 4.5:1. This is a hint only; you can still save.
editorDescription: White-label this tenant: title, colors, and logo. Leave a field blank to inherit the default.
logoDescription: Upload a PNG/JPEG/WebP (≤1 MB, stored in the object store) or paste an https URL (any image, incl. SVG). Applied immediately — not part of Save.
logoMaxHeightDescription: How tall the logo renders in the chip/sidebar (16–200). Blank = 28.
logoTooLarge: Logo must be at most 1 MB (this file is {{sizeKb}} KB).
logoUrlRequired: Enter an https URL, or use “Remove logo” to clear it.
noPermissionPrefix: You don’t have permission to edit this tenant’s branding. Ask a tenant administrator for the
primaryContrastWarning: Primary is {{ratio}}:1 against white button text — a lighter primary may read poorly on buttons. Hint only; you can still save.
sampleContent: Sample content on the card surface.
sidebarBackgroundHint: Applies to the branded chrome only.
title: Branding
uploadedLogoMimeError: Uploaded logos must be PNG, JPEG, or WebP. For SVG, host it and paste an https URL.
